description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docker that dispatches on a workflow trigger with an optional version input. Run two ubuntu-20.04 jobs: build-and-push-kiwix-tools and build-and-push-kiwix-serve. The first job checks out the repository and uses openzim/docker-publish-action to build and publish the kiwix/kiwix-tools Docker image with specific credentials, context, and build arguments. The second job depends on the first, checks out the repository, and uses openzim/docker-publish-action to build and publish the kiwix/kiwix-serve Docker image with similar configuration.
